prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, direct/port injection) with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (Garrett GTX3582R .82 A/R, 3071cc injectors, HKS SSQV5 blow-off valve, and HKS Hi-Power exhaust with 76mm titanium tips) paired with a Koyoritsu Racing 3.5-inch stainless downpipe and custom 3-inch cat-back system

Full bolt-on reinforcement with TRD GRMN front strut tower bar, Cusco 2-point rear strut brace, and Ultra Racing 4-point lower arm brace (Crown Royal-specific fitment) to mitigate chassis flex under boost

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (S-TS variant, 8K/10K spring rates) with custom valving for the Crown Royal's 16-inch wheelbase and 5-link rear suspension, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings (SuperPro 80-9040K)
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (Crown Royal-specific, 50mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon CFRP, 3-piece design) and rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny V3, modified for Crown Royal's sedan proportions)
Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front / 18x10.5 +45 rear wheels (ET-specific offsets for Crown Royal's 5x114.3 bolt pattern) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 245/40/18 front and 275/35/18 rear tires

Full JDM VIP conversion with custom shaved door handles (replaced with Valeo keyless entry), Toyota Century-style rear LED taillights (modified by Morimoto for Crown Royal housing), and a custom roof spoiler (Tom’s-style, carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment)
